name: livekit-sdks
description: List of all LiveKit SDK repositories (client SDKs, server SDKs, and agent frameworks). Each repository includes its package names in the "packages" field, allowing you to cross-reference package.json dependencies (e.g., "livekit-client") with their corresponding repository IDs (e.g., "livekit/client-sdk-js") and changelogs. Use formatRepositoriesAsMarkdown() or getPackageToRepoMapping() functions for alternative views.
